name: Guidelines for the Act on the Protection of Personal Information (General Rules)
description: Most recently revised December 2024, 189 pages. PPC's implementing/interpretive guidance for APPI (secid:regulation/ppc.go.jp/appi), with the concrete organizational/personnel/physical/technical security-control detail APPI's statutory text lacks.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/ppc.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Issued directly by a national government ministry/agency as an official notification/circular -- plausibly excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13(2) ("notifications, instructions, circulars, and other documents similar thereto issued by national or local government organs"), but this is a less clear-cut case than primary legislation (Art. 13(1)) and has not been legally verified. Treat as moderate-confidence permitted, not certain.

current_extraction.notes: Full text acquired (Japanese; no official English translation exists for this specific General Rules edition). PDF was encrypted (decrypted with qpdf), then pdftotext -layout extracted cleanly (189 pages, ~9,450 lines).
